name: amazon / General workflow 325
task: Look for an English language book on roman empire history in the Kindle store released in the last 90 days, it should be displayed according to its latest publication date, and add the top result to the shopping list.
goal_pattern: Look for an English language book on roman empire history in the Kindle store released in the last 90 days, it should be displayed according to its latest publication date, and add the top result to the shopping list.

applicability.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
applicability.when_not_to_use: Do not use if the current task asks for a different flow or page area.

steps.selection_rule: Choose the current visible candidate whose label, role, or nearby text best matches the target description.
steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.
